ddls:
CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Grass, Fire) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type's strengths/weaknesses */,
  "super_effective_against" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of types that the type is super effective against */,
  "not_very_effective_against" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of types that the type is not very effective against */,
  "no_effect_against" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of types that the type has no effect against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_number" INTEGER /* Generation number (e.g., 1 for Kanto) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generation */,
  "introduction_date" TEXT /* Date when the generation was introduced */,
  "total_pokemon" INTEGER /* Total number of Pokémon introduced in the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legendaries" (
  "legendary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legendary entry */,
  "pokedex_number" INTEGER /* Pokedex number of the legendary Pokémon */,
  "special_ability" TEXT /* Special ability unique to the legendary Pokémon */,
  "events" TEXT /* Events associated with the legendary Pokémon's availability */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points awarded for defeating the legendary Pokémon */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Probability of capturing the legendary Pokémon */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the legendary Pokémon is commonly found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legendary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mythicals" (
  "mythical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mythical entry */,
  "pokedex_number" INTEGER /* Pokedex number of the mythical Pokémon */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the mythical Pokémon */,
  "events" TEXT /* Events associated with the mythical Pokémon's availability */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points awarded for defeating the mythical Pokémon */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Probability of capturing the mythical Pokémon */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the mythical Pokémon is commonly found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mythical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "pokedex_number" INTEGER /* Pokedex number of the Pokémon */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form (e.g., Alolan Raichu) */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of the form (e.g., Alolan, Galarian) */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points awarded for defeating the form */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Probability of capturing the form */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the form is commonly found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the Pokémon data */,
  "pokedex_number" INTEGER /* Pokedex number of the Pokémon being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the Pokémon data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the database */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "pokedex_number" INTEGER /* Pokedex number of the Pokémon the image relates to */,
  "img_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "img_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to the thumbnail image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)
